items.text: Reply to BK Venues / Greenpoint Loft tour
Request formal proposals — Tasty Creations & Creative Foods
Schedule consult call — Jillicious Foods (10% off before Aug 1)
Reply to Bassett Caterers (followed up twice)
Reply to new vendors: Chef Rossi, Gracious Thyme, Marcey Brownstein
Draft full budget allocation across categories
Book caterer (target: Tasty Creations or Creative Foods)
Review and sign all vendor contracts
Confirm final guest counts with all vendors

venues.name: The Greenpoint Loft
notes: All Nov 2027 Saturdays available (confirmed by BK Venues)
Tour scheduling reply pending from Johnny
Catering: open to outside vendors; confirm kitchen fee

venues.name: Crystal Springs Resort
notes: Follow up if no reply within 1 week

venues.name: Backup shortlist
notes: 4–5 venues to be identified and contacted

catering.service_style_note: Plated dinner service ONLY. No buffet.
catering.budget_note: Keep food + bar + tax + rentals under ~$28-30K to leave room for all other vendors within $50K total.

vendors.name: Tasty Creations by LCI Caterers

estimate_150.notes: Tax 8.875% NY. Add ~$750 for 3 bartenders at $250 each.

included: Full dinner in chosen service style
China, silverware, glassware, linen napkins (multiple color options)
vendors.planner_note: Best value in the field. BK Venues preferred status + 35 years at these exact spaces. Strong recommend to prioritize.
vendors.next_action: Reply with Nov 6/13 dates, request formal proposal for 150 guests at Greenpoint Loft, plated + open bar standard

price_summary.note: Plated base + standard open bar. Includes rentals.

vendors.name: Creative Foods Catering

estimate_150.notes: Excludes BK Venue kitchen fee. Beef entrees add $8/pp if selected.

included: Food, service and rentals (linens, silverware, china, glassware, risers, trays)
Professional uniformed staff setup, service, and cleanup
Salad, dinner rolls, 2 entrees + vegetarian, 2 sides, 2 desserts
Liquor license, DOH Caterer's Permit, ServSafe certified, fully insured

entrees_notable: Braised short ribs (6-hr red wine demi)
Sultan's delight (braised lamb over eggplant purée)
desserts_notable: Mini dessert shooters (tiramisu, chocolate mousse, key lime)
menu_highlights.dietary: Vegan, GF, dairy-free, nut-free options available on request.

vendors.planner_note: Strong credentials, Greenpoint Loft track record, and the most granular bar pricing in the field. Diamond package + name brands bar at ~$30K is competitive. Impressive menu breadth.
vendors.next_action: Reply to confirm Greenpoint Loft, Nov 6 or 13, 150 guests — request Diamond package + name brands bar proposal

price_summary.note: Diamond pkg + name brands bar. Includes linens & rentals.

vendors.name: Chef Cava
vendors.experience: French Culinary Institute, former La Grenouille (3-star NYT)

estimate_150.notes: Linens and glassware are NOT included — separate cost. Custom seasonal menus.

included: Food, professional staffing, kitchen rentals (silverware, flatware, platters, equipment)
Setup 2 hrs before, breakdown 1 hr after
vendors.planner_note: High food quality ceiling — farm-to-table chef with La Grenouille background. Plated at $130/pp + $55 bar gets close to budget before linens/glassware. Worth a call to price out a complete package.
vendors.next_action: Send reply with Nov 6/13, Greenpoint Loft, 150 guests, plated service — request full itemized quote including linens and glassware

price_summary.note: Plated starting price + bar starting price. Linens/glassware extra.

vendors.name: Chef Rossi / The Raging Skillet
vendors.experience: Best Wedding Caterer — The Knot, 14 years running
awards: The Knot Best Wedding Caterer (14 consecutive years)

pricing.note: Fully custom / written to order. No standard pricing — must request quote. Sent info packet (docx attachment).

vendors.planner_note: Strong personality and impressive Knot track record. Everything custom. Worth a reply to get baseline pricing — could be a sleeper pick.
vendors.next_action: Reply with Nov 6/13, Greenpoint Loft, 150 guests, plated dinner — request starting price range for our event profile

price_summary.note: Custom / written to order. Pricing on request.

vendors.name: Gracious Thyme Catering

pricing.note: No pricing yet. Sent sample menu PDF. Needs date + venue to build custom proposal.

vendors.planner_note: Professional and responsive. Sent a sample menu. Needs our event details to produce a quote.
vendors.next_action: Reply with Nov 6/13, Greenpoint Loft, 150 guests, plated dinner — ask them to build a custom proposal

price_summary.note: Custom proposal needed. Sample menu sent.

vendors.name: MME Services / FiDi Hospitality

pricing.note: No pricing. Requested a call Friday at 11:30 AM. Farmingdale, NY based — corporate event focus.

vendors.planner_note: Corporate-leaning outfit based in Farmingdale, LI. No pricing shared. Low priority unless top picks fall through.
vendors.next_action: Low priority — hold until top picks are resolved

vendors.name: Bartleby & Sage

estimate_150.notes: 20% production fee is the budget killer. Rentals additional via Broadway Party Rentals.

vendors.planner_note: Extraordinary food and creativity — Southern BBQ buffet would be a perfect rustic fit. But 20% production fee pushes all-in to $45-50K before rentals. Over budget at 150 guests.
vendors.next_action: No action — over budget at 150 guests. Revisit only if guest count drops significantly.

price_summary.note: Plated + premium bar + 20% production fee. Over budget.

vendors.name: Jillicious Foods & Events

pricing.note: Fully custom. Brochure sent. Request pricing on call.
pricing.discount_offer: 10% off wedding menus if booked by August 1, 2026

vendors.planner_note: Food story concept fits rustic/intimate vibe. 10% discount deadline is urgent — worth a 20-min call before Aug 1 just to get pricing.
vendors.next_action: Book consult call via calendly.com/jilliciousfoods/clientconversation BEFORE July 31 to lock in 10% discount

price_summary.note: Fully custom. Call required. 10% off if booked by Aug 1.

vendors.name: Marcey Brownstein Catering

pricing.note: Fully custom — call required. Suggested Mon/Tue for a phone conversation.

vendors.planner_note: Solid NYC reputation. No pricing info. Follow up if top picks fall through.
vendors.next_action: Reply agreeing to a call. Propose Monday or Tuesday, ask for a few time options.

vendors.name: Fig & Pig Catering

pricing.note: All-in (food, bar, staff, tax, gratuity) but rentals separate. Over budget for 150 guests.

vendors.planner_note: Outstanding food reputation (5.0 stars). But $225-325/pp all-in approaches entire $50K budget. Only viable if guest count drops below 100.
vendors.next_action: No action needed — revisit only if guest count drops significantly.

price_summary.note: All-in pp range (food + bar + staff + tax + gratuity). Rentals extra. Over budget.

vendors.name: Bassett Caterers

pricing.note: BK Venue packages available. Need event date to check availability.

vendors.planner_note: Familiar with all BK Venues locations, have BK-designed packages. Followed up twice — respond soon.
vendors.next_action: Reply with Nov 6/13 dates, Greenpoint Loft, 150 guests, plated service — agree to a call

price_summary.note: BK Venue packages available. Awaiting date to quote.

vendors.name: EVENTFULLNYC

pricing.note: Plated default. Needs event details for custom proposal.

vendors.planner_note: Has pricing transparency and replied quickly. Worth pursuing if top picks fall through.
vendors.next_action: Reply with: 150 guests, Nov 6 or 13, Greenpoint Loft, plated service, ~6 hours, open bar needed

price_summary.note: Food-only starting range. Bar pricing not yet provided.

vendors.name: Dish Food & Events

pricing.note: No pricing yet. Sent wedding brochure.

vendors.planner_note: LIC-based, knows BK Venues. Low priority until top picks are resolved.
vendors.next_action: Reply with Greenpoint Loft details if needed — low priority

decision_framework.budget_comfortable: ~$24-27K — Tasty Creations (plated + open bar standard + tax)
decision_framework.budget_stretch: ~$28-32K — Creative Foods Diamond + name brands bar / Chef Cava plated + bar
next_steps: Get formal proposals from Tasty Creations AND Creative Foods simultaneously
Schedule Jillicious call before Aug 1 for 10% discount
Reply to Bassett (they followed up twice)
Reply to Chef Rossi + Gracious Thyme with event details
Defer Bartleby & Sage, Fig & Pig, MME Services — over budget or low priority at 150 guests

notes.text: NJ/NY vendor pricing often carries hidden service charges and layered fees — always request fully itemized quotes before signing.
Pursue multiple venues simultaneously — fall Saturdays in this market book 12–18 months in advance.
Nov 6 and Nov 13 are the recommended date targets. Nov 20 carries Thanksgiving travel conflict risk.
Jillicious Foods: 10% discount if booked by Aug 1, 2026 — schedule consult call ASAP.
Top catering picks: Tasty Creations (~$24K est.) and Creative Foods Diamond pkg (~$30K est.) — request formal proposals from both.
Bartleby & Sage 20% production fee adds ~$7K — pushes to $45-50K before rentals. Over budget at 150 guests.
New respondents (Jun 26): Chef Rossi, Gracious Thyme, MME Services — replies drafted and ready to send.
